heading: Debt restructuring and loan servicing for community facility loans
label: 2001a Debt restructuring and loan servicing for community facility loans
text: The Secretary shall establish and implement a program that is similar to the program established under , except that the debt restructuring and loan servicing procedures shall apply to delinquent community facility program loans (rather than delinquent farmer program loans) made by the Farmers Home Administration to a hospital or health care facility under .section 2001 of this titlesection 1926(a) of this title
notes: Regulations, , , provided that:Pub. L. 101–624, title XXIII, § 2384(b)104 Stat. 4050Nov. 28, 1990“Not later than 120 days after the date of enactment of this Act [], the Secretary shall promulgate regulations, modeled after those promulgated under such section 353 [], that implement the program established under section 353A of the Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act [].”Nov. 28, 19907 U.S.C. 20017 U.S.C. 2001a
